title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.10 - Constant Struggle / Constant Growth now show the Weak / Unweak tooltip on hover; and base debuffs that are both invertible and swappable (Weak/Vulnerable/Frail) now correctly show BOTH the Invertible and Swappable tooltip suffixes.
